description: User scrolls down through the search results for 'homelone australia bank st george' to view different bank offers and then scrolls back up to the top.
frame_description: The user is browsing through sponsored and organic search results for home loans.

description: User clicks on the search bar to modify the current search query.
User modifies the search query by deleting 'st george' and adding an 's' to 'bank', changing the query to 'homelone australia banks'.
User triggers a new search, leading to a page load for the updated query 'homelone australia banks'.
frame_description: The screen dims as the new search results page loads.

description: User pauses to examine the new search results, which now feature Macquarie Bank as a sponsored result.
frame_description: The user is looking at the top of the new search results page.
